value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI that transforms structured resume data into polished PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, and Markdown, with pluggable templates and AI-powered resume review and optimization. Built in Go, it streamlines multi-format resume generation and integrates ready-to-pipe AI prompts.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory, supporting cognitive verbs, plain-markdown memories, local candle embeddings, and HNSW semantic search across memory and code. Benchmarked on LongMemEval, it enables tool-agnostic, semantic memory management for agents.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and MCP server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating providers like Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google behind a single interface. Designed for seamless orchestration of advanced AI workflows.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: Flappy Bird clone built with JavaFX and Java 21, showcasing data-oriented design patterns and automated native builds for Linux, macOS, and Windows. Serves as a cross-platform desktop development and game logic demonstration.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with a command-line interface, implemented in Python using object-oriented design. Ideal for exploring chess AI algorithms and learning game logic from the terminal.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal user interface, written in Rust and Shell. Enables modular management and orchestration of agent capabilities through a TUI.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Single Rust binary for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, with no runtime dependencies. Simplifies visual documentation and demo creation across platforms.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, featuring modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization. Supports reinforcement learning and classification tasks in a research-ready environment.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting data quantity as the key bottleneck in deep learning performance. Implemented with Jupyter Notebook and Python.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall through semantic embeddings and feature extraction. Built with Jupyter Notebook and Python.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, featuring one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux with Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills. Integrates Homebrew/apt and per-language version managers for streamlined environment setup.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go library for durable execution: wrap existing functions to run as workers with ledgers and queues over user-owned storage. Simplifies adding reliability and persistence to Go codebases.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding extension for Neovim, enabling users to speak their intent and see edits appear directly in the editor. Built with Lua, Rust, and Vim Script for seamless integration.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI. Supports multi-language integration for generative artifact workflows.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics tool offering SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation. Available as a CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action for automated insights.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments, enabling reinforcement learning research and experimentation without Python dependencies.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js. Showcases projects and research in a visually engaging format.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers. Facilitates code documentation and snippet management.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI tool that converts a blog post into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn posts. Streamlines multi-platform content publishing from a single source.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, deploying scalable, sandboxed agents with metrics and NGAC policy enforcement. Built with Go for secure, policy-driven agent orchestration.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: Undergraduate thesis on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, presented as a TeX and Shell project. Documents research findings and methodologies.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Observable language models where every hidden state is a readable distribution over words, featuring a glassbox CLI for tracing, causal probing, and faithfulness coverage. Pursues model observability without sacrificing performance.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Drop-in stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning. Simplifies robust model evaluation in deep learning workflows.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally. Connects ideas securely without cloud dependencies.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using Jinja2 template packs for customizable code generation. Supports SSE streaming and literal-faithful enum output.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, providing a single static binary with zero runtime dependencies and automated semantic versioning from conventional commits.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating communication-focused PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README featuring auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated on a schedule by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust, supporting robust and efficient pipeline construction.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices by AI agents, with no cloud or hub required. Built with Go and Shell for privacy-focused automation.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, containing JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Serves as a test case for debugging.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Community-focused Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, enabling peer-to-peer item exchanges with enterprise-grade mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I build modular, streaming systems for AI agents and semantic memory, mostly in Go and Rust. Projects like incipit and mnemonist show how I approach multi-format pipelines and local-first agent cognition from the ground up.
